summary: Conduct a full PRISMA-compliant systematic review with protocol registration, dual screening, data extraction, risk-of-bias assessment, and synthesis.

inputs.name: review_protocol
inputs.description: Registered or documented review protocol with PICO or equivalent.

inputs.name: databases
inputs.description: List of academic databases to search.

inputs.name: quality_tool
inputs.description: Risk of bias assessment tool to use (Cochrane RoB, NOS, etc.).

outputs.name: prisma_flow_diagram
outputs.description: Complete PRISMA flow diagram with all screening stages.

outputs.name: data_extraction_table
outputs.description: Standardized extraction table for all included studies.

outputs.name: risk_of_bias_summary
outputs.description: Risk of bias assessment for each included study.

outputs.name: synthesis_report
outputs.description: Narrative or quantitative synthesis with evidence grading.

gates.rule: Confirm a review protocol exists with defined PICO or equivalent framework.
Verify search strategy covers all specified databases.
Confirm dual screening was performed and disagreements resolved.
Synthesis must include risk of bias assessment and evidence quality grading.

steps.action: Register or document the review protocol with objectives and eligibility criteria.
Execute systematic search across all specified databases with documented strategies.
Screen titles, abstracts, and full texts with dual independent reviewers.
Extract data using standardized forms for all included studies.
Assess risk of bias for each included study using the specified tool.
Synthesize findings with evidence grading and sensitivity analysis.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read review protocol and prior review data.

tools.name: web.fetch
tools.purpose: Fetch full texts for screening and extraction.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save all review outputs including PRISMA diagram and tables.

verification.method: Verify all protocol-specified procedures were followed.
Verify two independent screeners reviewed all records.
Verify risk of bias assessed for all included studies.
Verify synthesis includes evidence quality grading.

success_criteria: PRISMA flow diagram accounts for every record from search to inclusion.
Data extraction covers all pre-specified fields.
Synthesis includes risk of bias and evidence quality assessment.

rollback.when: If dual screening was not performed or protocol deviations found, restart from the affected stage.
